title.en: How Kane and Haaland compare - who would you pick?

title.en: Olise yellow card stands as Saibari out for Morocco

summary.en: France fail in their bid to have forward Michael Olise's yellow card overturned, while Morocco are without Ismael Saibari for the quarter-final at Boston Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 法国未能推翻迈克尔·奥利斯（ Michael Olise ）的黄牌，而摩洛哥在波士顿体育场的四分之一决赛中没有伊斯梅尔·赛巴里（ Ismael Saibari ）。

title.en: Could Morocco become a football powerhouse?
title.zh-CN: 摩洛哥能否成为足球强国？

summary.en: Morocco face France in the 2026 World Cup quarter-finals on Thursday as the Atlas Lions look to reach the last four once again.

title.en: Noboody can question integrity of World Cup referees - Collina
title.zh-CN: Noboody可以质疑世界杯裁判的诚信- Collina

summary.en: World Cup officials are not "influenced by anyone" and "nobody can question the integrity" when it comes to decision-making, says Fifa chief refereeing officer Pierluigi Collina.
summary.zh-CN: 国际足联首席裁判官皮尔路易吉·科利纳（ Pierluigi Collina ）表示，世界杯官员在决策时不会“受到任何人的影响” ， “没有人可以质疑诚信”。

title.en: Late goals, comebacks and upsets - is record-breaking World Cup best ever?

summary.zh-CN: 这是一届多么精彩的世界杯，有着伟大的进球、惊心动魄的复出、后期的戏剧、令人震惊的结果。但是这场比赛将如何被记住？
